file.content:
name: build

'on':
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: '51 2 * * 4'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  fmt:
    name: cargo fmt
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v6
    - name: cargo fmt
      run: cargo fmt --all -- --check

  clippy:
    name: cargo clippy
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v6
    - name: cargo clippy
      run: cargo clippy --all --all-targets -- -D warnings

  test:
    name: cargo test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v6
    - name: cargo test
      run: cargo test

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    curl \
    git \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y

ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN cargo build

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
